scheme_name: Tablet Assistance to Scheduled Caste Students of 12th Standard
page_title: Tablet Assistance to Scheduled Caste Students of 12th Standard

details: The “Tablet Assistance to Scheduled Caste Students” scheme is administered by the Director, Scheduled Caste Welfare, Government of Gujarat. Under the scheme, tablets are provided to students in the 12th standard who belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) category.
benefits: Under the scheme, students in the 12th standard belonging to the Scheduled Caste category will receive a tablet by paying a token fee of ₹1,000/-.
eligibility: The student should belong to the Scheduled Caste of Gujarat.
The student should be studying in 12th Standard.
: The students should have received a tablet from the education department by paying a token fee of ₹1,000/-

online: The applicant may visit the Digital Gujarat Portal:
On the home page, click on ‘Register’ and the applicant will be redirected to the registration form page.
Enter your Mobile Number, Email, Set Password, and then click on ‘Save’.
After successful registration, the applicant can login through his/her User Name (Mobile No./Email ID) and Password.
Now, click on ‘My Profile’ to update your profile and fill in all the mandatory information.
After filling in profile details, click on ‘Update Profile’. The profile will be updated after entering the verification Code (OTP).
Now under services, select ‘Scholarship Services’ and then click on ‘SC Scheme’.
Select the Financial Year in which you want to apply for and then click on ‘Change Financial Year’.
Select the scheme, read the interaction carefully, and then click on ‘Continue to Service’.
Fill in the application form completely and upload all the relevant documents.
Now, click on ‘Save as Draft’ and agree with the terms & conditions, and submit the application form by clicking on ‘Confirm & Final Submit’.
To avail the benefits of the scheme, the student may also contact to principal of his/her school.
Photo uploading for all applicants is mandatory.
The application will be considered complete only when all sections are completed.

Only one application per applicant will be acceptable for Tablet assistance. If any student submits more than one application either from a single institute or from multiple institutions his/her applications will be rejected by the competent authority and no request from any side will be entertained.
In case of any wrong/misleading information provided in the application shall lead to rejection of the application by Department Authorities.
All required documents must be carefully scanned as per the instructions given.
The student has to fill out his/her application carefully as there is no provision for institution change once the application is submitted successfully.
The unreadable uploaded documents will allow the competent authority to reject student applications.

Direct Individual submission of this application form will not be accepted in case of students studying inside the state. Only outside students have to fill out their form online and submit his/her application form to their native district officer.

documents_required: Caste Certificate From the Competent Authority
First Page of Bank Passbook/Cancelled Cheque
Break Affidavit (If Break Gap is More than One Year)

faqs.question: Who administers the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme is administered by the Director, Scheduled Caste Welfare, Government of Gujarat.

faqs.question: What are the benefits offered under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Students in the 12th standard belonging to the Scheduled Caste category will receive a tablet by paying a token fee of ₹1,000/-.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for students to avail of the tablet assistance?
faqs.answer: The student must belong to the Scheduled Caste of Gujarat and be studying in the 12th standard.

faqs.question: Is there any income limit for eligibility?
faqs.answer: No, there is no income limit specified for eligibility under this scheme.

faqs.question: How can eligible students apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Eligible students can apply for the scheme through the Digital Gujarat Portal: https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/.

faqs.question: Can students from other states apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme is for students belonging to the Scheduled Caste of Gujarat.
